positive: A cyberpunk cityscape vista at dusk. Neon signs illuminate rain-slicked streets, featuring flying vehicles and holographic advertisements. Geometric, high-contrast digital art with deep purples, electric blues, and magenta accents. Synthwave aesthetic, cinematic, highly detailed, concept art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural foliage, sketch lines
